title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology examines six security dangers posed by autonomous AI agents, focusing on vulnerabilities introduced by agent autonomy, tool integration, and memory systems. The presentation highlights risks including prompt injection and credential exposure as critical concerns for safe agentic AI deployment.
